Welcome to the beginning of the new layout that is currently being created, and will soon be out for you to view, and enjoy! First of all, we would like to say sorry, for not updating in a long time, the reason for that, is because we have been very busy lately, and barely have chance to do some work. We are glad to announce another layout... yes yes, another layout, and I believe that this next one, is the one we will keep. We are looking for a more professional look, and we would like to create this. Our Flash layout, is in creation also, and you will surly be impressed, when you find out what we have been up to! Finally, we would like to say, that a lot of the link submits that have been submitted haven't been read, due to an overload with e-mails on my e-mail account. But, we have assigned someone new to keep track of these, and he will review all sites, and put them up if acceptable. And most of all, we

have a small preview of our upcoming layout... the preview if very small, but just to make a small impression... this is the enter page, which we decided to make with a black background, but the actual page, will be created with a white background which we think brings out the essence in a professional web site. Please do not copy this layout, for if we find you doing this, we will have someone remove your site, due to copyright laws. Thank you, and have a great time!
